script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== heather .claude contents ==='
ls -la /home/heather/.claude/ 2>&1
echo '=== aixa .claude contents (post-migration) ==='
ls -la /home/aixa/.claude/ 2>&1
echo '=== azureuser .claude top level (mskai) ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude/ 2>&1 | head -20
echo '=== heather settings.json (size + first 200 chars if exists) ==='
ls -la /home/heather/.claude/settings.json 2>&1
head -c 200 /home/heather/.claude/settings.json 2>&1
echo
echo '===END==='
